data.title: Update test-marketplace-json.sh to assert two git-subdir plugin entries
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh to assert the new two-entry git-subdir structure for .claude-plugin/marketplace.json. The test must FAIL (RED) before the implementation because the current file has a single relative-path entry.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh

## Test Cases to Add/Update
Add these assertions after the existing basic structure tests:
1. test_marketplace_json_has_two_plugins: plugins array has exactly 2 entries (dso and dso-dev)
2. test_marketplace_json_dso_uses_git_subdir: plugins[0] or plugins[?name="dso"] has source.source="git-subdir" and source.url contains "navapbc/digital-service-orchestra" and source.path="plugins/dso" and source.ref="main"
3. test_marketplace_json_dso_dev_uses_git_subdir: plugins[?name="dso-dev"] same git-subdir structure with ref="main"

## Given/When/Then
Given: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json has been restructured to two git-subdir entries.
When: test-marketplace-json.sh runs.
Then: all three new assertions pass.

## RED Marker
Add RED marker [test_marketplace_json_has_two_plugins] to .test-index for .claude-plugin/marketplace.json

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test-marketplace-json.sh has valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_marketplace_json_has_two_plugins] for .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
  Verify: grep '\[test_marketplace_json_has_two_plugins\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Updated tests FAIL on current marketplace.json (confirms RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh; test $? -ne 0
